title: Twist Bioscience Beats Q3 Earnings Forecast, Plans To Achieve 50% Gross Margin By Fiscal Year 2025
text: Twist Bioscience (NASDAQ: TWST) exceeded third-quarter expectations with adjusted EPS loss of $(0.70), surpassing the consensus estimate of $(0.77). Revenue reached $81.5 million, up 27.8% year-over-year and beating both consensus ($77.4 million) and company guidance ($77 million). The company demonstrated significant operational improvements, with gross margin expanding to 43.3% from 34.4% annually—a 900 basis point improvement. CEO Emily Leproust noted the company surpassed revenue guidance and exceeded targets for both cash burn and gross margin. Q3 net loss was $85.6 million ($1.47 per share) while customer base reached approximately 2,300 accounts. Gene shipments totaled approximately 212,000 units. Twist raised full-year 2024 revenue guidance to $310-$311 million from previous $300-$304 million, with Q4 expectations of $82-$83 million. The company projects gross margin reaching approximately 42% for fiscal 2024 and targeting over 50% by fiscal year 2025. TWST declined 13.21% on the announcement, closing at $46.04.
